body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We thought this was allowed before but it was being handled incorrectly. Note that ClimaAtmos reads in `h_elem` and `nh_poly` from the config dictionary, so we needed to add coupler-specific args to differentiate from those. Also `get_atmos_height_delta` becomes a very simple function that could probably be removed.

title: allow finer coupler resolution

body: Small follow-up to #1879 to initialize the area fractions in the coupler fields from the models in `model_sims` (in case e.g. sea-ice is non-zero from the start). If a model is not in `model_sims`, its area fraction is set to 0.
title: Initialize area frac fields from model sims
